rationale: ShowX-3.2 wiring bundle authorized 2026-06-07. Three task specs closing the integration gap exposed by v0.1.2 install: shell mode mounts FirstLaunchPicker/CuelistCorePanel (B003-201), station mode mounts SMMasterView/OperatorView (B003-202), routing UI rules drive dispatch (B003-203). Bundle outline: docs/agent_exchange/bundles/ShowX-3-2-wiring.md.
